The '''Alaris Expanse''' was an area of [[Realspace/Legends|space]] in the outer part of the [[Kashyyyk system/Legends|Kashyyyk system]],<ref name="GB" /> located within [[The Slice/Legends|the Slice]] portion of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]].<ref name="TEA" /> It contained the [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] [[Alaris/Legends|Alaris]]<ref name="GB" /> and its eight [[Moon/Legends|moons]],<ref name="TEA" /> including [[Alaris Prime/Legends|Alaris Prime]].<ref name="GB" /> Between [[39 BBY/Legends|39 BBY]] and [[36 BBY/Legends|36 BBY]],<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' places the colonization of [[Alaris Prime/Legends|Alaris Prime]] between [[39 BBY/Legends|39 BBY]] and [[36 BBY/Legends|36 BBY]].</ref> [[Alaris Prime colonists|colonists]] of the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Species/Legends|species]] traveled through the Alaris Expanse aboard the [[Transport/Legends|transport]] [[Starship/Legends|vessel]] ''[[Thalmussen]]'' to reach Alaris Prime and [[Colonist/Legends|colonize]] it.<ref name="GB" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Alaris Expanse was first mentioned in the introductory description of the [[Attichitcuk/Legends|Attichitcuk]] campaign in the [[2001]] [[LucasArts]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'', and was also shown in the introduction to the campaign's first level, "Moving and Attacking."<ref name="GB" />

The campaign description labeled the Expanse as a group of [[Planet/Legends|planets]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. The game's databank, however, placed Alaris Prime in the Kashyyyk [[Star system/Legends|system]],<ref name="GB" /> which the [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed within the Mid Rim.<ref name="TEA" />
